summary: Clean, cohesive recording of a fun 1988 show highlighted by an inspired Wharf Rat performance.
review: Both reviewers rave about the night’s relaxed vibe and the band’s tight, inspired playing. The recording is praised as clean and clear, making it a solid addition to any collection, with Wharf Rat standing out as a peak moment.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive reviews (5★ and 4★) highlight strong show performance and good recording quality, resulting in an average rating near the top of the scale but confidence is low due to the small sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a clean, clear recording with no reported issues; sound is pleasant and captures the live atmosphere well.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Two solid Dead sets played in a relaxed, fun setting; the band’s cohesion and energy kept the momentum flowing smoothly throughout the long day.
